name: zen
description: Variable name improvement, function extraction, magic number constants, dead code removal, and code review. For refactoring and PR review — does not change behavior.

capabilities.summary: Long method decomposition with single responsibility
Unused imports, unreachable code, retired feature flags
Collapse verbose conditionals while preserving behavior
Convert nested conditionals to early returns

recipes.label: General Refactor
recipes.when: General refactoring (composite improvements, code smell fixes)

recipes.label: Naming Improvement
recipes.when: Variable and function name improvements only

recipes.label: Magic Constants
recipes.when: Replace magic numbers with named constants

recipes.label: Simplify Logic
recipes.when: Compress redundant branches, ternaries, and unnecessary conversions into equivalent concise forms

recipes.label: Split Function
recipes.when: Incrementally split overly long functions along responsibility boundaries (enhanced `extract`)

recipes.label: Guard Clauses
recipes.when: Convert nested `if` to early return / guard clauses
